overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cinematic open-world game showing a character riding a horse through a narrow canyon at dusk. The journey progresses from a shaded cliffside path, across a rushing river, and onto the opposite rocky bank, with a rope bridge visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow canyon trail under rock overhang

agents.ego_description: riding a horse at steady trot along a narrow cliffside path beside a river

entered.detail: dark rocky overhang sheltering the path from above
tall vertical rock face forming the right boundary of the canyon
flowing river with turquoise water visible to the left of the path
tall evergreen trees growing on the opposite canyon slope
narrow dirt and rock path winding along the cliff edge

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a third-person view following a horse and rider through a narrow, shadowed canyon trail. The path runs beneath a rocky overhang with a steep cliff wall on the right and a flowing river visible to the left. Tall pine trees grow on the distant canyon slopes in the blue-hour lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated rocky ledge approaching river crossing

events.description: horse enters the river water to begin crossing to the opposite bank

agents.ego_description: riding along an exposed rocky ledge and descending toward the river crossing

entered.detail: suspension bridge spanning the canyon visible in the distant background
steep rocky canyon walls rising on the left side across the river
large boulders scattered along the riverbank

segments.scene_description: The horse emerges from under the overhang onto an exposed rocky ledge with the river now closer on the left. A rope bridge becomes visible in the distant canyon. The path descends toward the water, and at the end of the segment, the horse steps into the river to cross.

scene_state.functional_zone: river crossing and opposite rocky bank

events.description: horse exits the river onto the rocky shore on the opposite bank

agents.ego_description: swimming the horse across the river and then riding along the opposite rocky bank

entered.detail: rocky riverbank on the opposite side of the canyon
tall rock formations lining both sides of the canyon

segments.scene_description: The horse wades and swims through the flowing river water, moving from the left side of the frame to the right. After exiting onto the rocky opposite bank around the 48-second mark, the rider continues along the shore with the river now on the right. The rope bridge remains visible in the distance ahead as the journey continues through the canyon.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a shadowed canyon that gradually opens up as a rider crosses a rushing river toward a distant landmark. It begins by trailing a horse and rider along a narrow, shaded path beneath a rocky overhang, with steep cliffs on one side and a river flowing below in the dim blue-hour light. As the horse emerges from the shadows onto an exposed rocky ledge, the path descends toward the water while a rope bridge comes into view in the distance. The camera then follows the horse as it wades and swims across the flowing current, shifting from the left bank to the right. Finally, the rider exits the water onto the opposite rocky shore and continues forward with the river now trailing to the right, heading steadily toward the distant bridge.
